2606.06492.title: Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution
2606.06492.paper_summary: Code language models need repository-level context to resolve imports, APIs, and project conventions. Existing methods inject this knowledge as long inputs (retrieved through RAG or dependency analysis) or through per-repository fine-tuning and LoRA -- costly at repository scale and brittle to evolving codebases. We introduce Code2LoRA, a hypernetwork framework that generates repository-specific LoRA adapters, effectively injecting repository knowledge with zero inference-time token overhead. Code2LoRA supports two usage scenarios: Code2LoRA-Static converts a single repository snapshot into an adapter, suitable for comprehension of stable codebases; while Code2LoRA-Evo maintains an adapter backed by a GRU hidden state updated per code diff, suitable for active development of evolving codebases. To evaluate Code2LoRA against parameter-efficient fine-tuning baselines, we build RepoPeftBench, a benchmark of 604 Python repositories with two tracks: a static track with 40K training and 12K test assertion-completion tasks, and an evolution track with 215K commit-derived training and 87K commit-derived test tasks. On the static track, Code2LoRA-Static achieves 63.8% cross-repo and 66.2% in-repo exact match, matching the per-repository LoRA upper bound; on the evolution track, Code2LoRA-Evo achieves 60.3% cross-repo exact match (+5.2 pp over a single shared LoRA). Code2LoRA's code can be found at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/code2lora-6857; the model checkpoints and RepoPeftBench datasets can be found at https://huggingface.co/code2lora.
2606.06492.paper_summary_zh: 程式碼語言模型需要庫級上下文來解析導入、API 和專案慣例。現有的方法將這些知識作為長輸入（通過 RAG 或依賴分析檢索）或通過每個庫的微調和 LoRA 注入——這在庫規模上成本高昂，且對於不斷變化的代碼庫較為脆弱。我們介紹了 Code2LoRA，這是一個超網絡框架，可生成特定於庫的 LoRA 適配器，有效地以零推理時間的標記開銷注入庫知識。Code2LoRA 支持兩種使用場景：Code2LoRA-Static 將單個庫快照轉換為適配器，適合於穩定代碼庫的理解；而 Code2LoRA-Evo 則維護一個由每次代碼差異更新的 GRU 隱藏狀態支持的適配器，適合於不斷發展的代碼庫的主動開發。為了評估 Code2LoRA 相對於參數高效微調基準，我們建立了 RepoPeftBench，這是一個包含 604 個 Python 庫的基準，分為兩個軌道：靜態軌道有 40K 訓練和 12K 測試斷言完成任務，而演進軌道有 215K 基於提交的訓練和 87K 基於提交的測試任務。在靜態軌道上，Code2LoRA-Static 實現了 63.8% 的跨庫和 66.2% 的庫內精確匹配，達到每個庫的 LoRA 上限；在演進軌道上，Code2LoRA-Evo 實現了 60.3% 的跨庫精確匹配（比單一共享 LoRA 多 5.2 個百分點）。Code2LoRA 的代碼可以在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/code2lora-6857 找到；模型檢查點和 RepoPeftBench 數據集可以在 https://huggingface.co/code2lora 找到。
2606.06492.author: Liliana Hotsko et.al.
2606.06492.authors: Liliana Hotsko, Yinxi Li, Yuntian Deng, Pengyu Nie
